steps.title: Extract the given value
steps.content: The equation $x-2=3$ tells us the value of the quantity $(x-2)$. Rather than solving for $x$ separately, we recognize that $(x-2)$ is already defined in the problem.

steps.title: Substitute into the target expression
steps.content:
We need to find $3(x-2)$. Since $(x-2)=3$:

$$3(x-2) = 3 \cdot 3 = 9$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
